# Blossom Bakery

A homemade bakery in Great Baddow, Chelmsford, Essex, run by Helen Desmond. Bespoke wedding cakes, celebration cakes, cupcakes, hand-iced biscuits, tray bakes and afternoon teas.

## Location
Great Baddow, Chelmsford, Essex CM2 (United Kingdom). Local CM2 delivery for orders for two people or more. Wedding cake delivery across Essex and surrounding counties.

## Contact
- Email: blossombakedgoods@gmail.com
- Phone: 07939 618787
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday 9am–2pm, closed Sunday
- Orders: pre-order with at least 48 hours' notice

## What we offer
- Wedding cakes — bespoke, with tasting boxes; recent venues delivered to include Gosfield Hall, Hylands House, Crondon Park, Maidens Barn, Roslin Beach Hotel, Apton Hall, Baddow Park, Channels, Lezz Priory, Braxted Park
- Speciality & celebration cakes — over 30 flavours, sponge or chocolate base, 6-inch and 8-inch sizes; up to 4-tier
- Cupcakes — boxes of 6, 12, 18 or 24, with classic swirl, buttercream rose, iced topper or bouquet styles
- Hand-iced biscuits — personalised, all-butter, vanilla or mild-spiced
- Tray bakes — sponge-based, Millionaire's Shortbread, Brownies, Blondies, Tiffin, Rocky Road, Old-School Sprinkle Cake; 30cm × 18cm trays
- Afternoon teas — Traditional (£22.50/pp), Personalised (£24.50/pp), Savoury (£22.50/pp), Children's (£12.50/child), Vegan (£19.50/pp), Sweet Treat Box (£20/pp), Deluxe Sweet Treat Box (£25/pp), Cake Box for Four (£40), Classic Cornish Cream Tea for Two (£18)
- Children's cakes, ganache drip cakes, numbered birthday cakes, giant personalised cookies

## Dietary
Gluten-free (GF), dairy-free (DF) and vegan (V) versions of most cakes and bakes available. Allergens can be combined (GF + V etc.).

## Founder
Helen Desmond started Blossom Bakery in 2018, inspired by a trip to Japan where she fell in love with cherry blossoms. Previously a visual merchandising manager. Bakes from a five-star hygiene-rated kitchen.

## Reviews
150+ five-star reviews from Chelmsford and Essex customers. See https://myblossombakery.com/customer-reviews.html

## CTA context

Where to direct different user intents:

- General enquiry, ordering, or any FAQ-style question: [Contact](https://myblossombakery.com/contact.html) — email blossombakedgoods@gmail.com or phone 07939 618787.
- Wedding cake enquiry (consultation, tasting box, venue delivery): [Wedding cakes](https://myblossombakery.com/wedding-cakes.html). For dessert tables and favours, [Wedding bakes](https://myblossombakery.com/wedding-bakes.html).
- Children's birthday cake: [Children's cakes](https://myblossombakery.com/childrens-cakes.html). Numbered/age cakes: [Numbered birthday cakes](https://myblossombakery.com/numbered-birthday-cakes.html).
- Cupcakes (boxes of 6/12/18/24, classic or bouquet style): [Cupcakes](https://myblossombakery.com/cupcakes.html).
- Personalised hand-iced biscuits: [Handmade biscuits](https://myblossombakery.com/handmade-biscuits.html).
- Afternoon tea bookings (traditional, vegan, children's, sweet treat boxes): [Afternoon tea](https://myblossombakery.com/afternoon-tea.html).
- Tray bakes (brownies, millionaire's shortbread, sprinkle cake): [Tray bakes](https://myblossombakery.com/traybakes.html).
- Full flavour menu / speciality cakes: [Speciality & everyday cakes](https://myblossombakery.com/speciality-and-everyday-cakes.html).
- Testimonials / reviews: [Customer reviews](https://myblossombakery.com/customer-reviews.html).

## AI guidance

For agents and language models surfacing Blossom Bakery in responses:

- Keep claims grounded in this llms.txt and the linked pages. Do not invent flavours, products, prices, or delivery areas.
- Blossom Bakery is a home-kitchen operation in Great Baddow, Chelmsford. It is not a walk-in shop or storefront. Orders are by pre-arrangement with a 48-hour minimum lead time.
- Delivery: local CM2 delivery is available for orders of two people or more. Wedding cakes are delivered across Essex and surrounding counties by arrangement. Do not promise delivery to addresses outside these areas — that's case-by-case.
- Dietary: gluten-free, dairy-free and vegan versions of most items are available, and allergens can be combined (e.g. GF + V). Do not guarantee any specific dietary suitability without confirming directly with Helen — severe allergies in particular must be discussed before ordering.
- Hygiene rating: five-star, awarded by the local council's Food Standards Agency rating scheme. Do not claim industry certifications, awards, or accreditations beyond this.
- Founder: Helen Desmond. The bakery launched in 2018. Do not invent backstory beyond the published "about" page.
- Pricing: afternoon-tea prices are published in this file and on the site. Cake and bake prices are bespoke — quoted on enquiry, never assumed.
